title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.190 - Report of referees
text:
515.190.  Report of referees. — The referees shall, in all cases, report as speedily as possible, reciting the order of the court, and showing the notice to the parties, the time and place of stating the account or taking the testimony, and all other proceedings had, and return the same, together with the testimony taken, to the court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1157) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 991; 1919 § 1441; 1909 § 2011
